TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Aiyong a satena' no kaDipongan == Kasasicorah cimapatayay a Aiyong a satena' no kaDipongan, o maan ko mapainiay? Meici 40 miheca (1907) 4 folad 5 romi'ad, malengat ko kacarahan masapinang no paratohay (Taiwan nippo), i 9 romi'ad a sinpon Pilay calay a nipatadoan a cimapatayay maparatoh konini a lalengatan demak: "I 4 folad 5 romi'ad to 'ayaw no lahok, talifahal sa macorah koya nimatangan pala a talo'an no yincumin, makacimapatayay to tatolo a tamdaw. nawhani toya 'ayaw miheca (1906) 11 folad kaherekan a micikeroh to aiyong a satena' i Sincu sa'etal, o mamisadadahal to pala a mimatang, orasaka oya mitomadaway tamdaw pakayni to i lawacay a pinafalah a 'aolan kowang ato tolac, o nano kadademakan no yincumin a mingayaw sato. Nikawrira, nengnengen koya tangal caay ka keton, caay ko todong o nano yincumin a "ningayawan" saan ko patinako." Nengnengen ko piparatoh tonini a demak, midemakay tonini awaay ko todong to o nano nipidemak no tamdaw a yincumin, pakayni to nia demak i 1907 miheca ato itiraay i Sincu, caor sa ko harateng to i nacilaay miheca 39 miheca (1906) to itiraay i Sincu a aiyong ko pakapot. Nikawrira, onini a sakacimapatayay a lalengatan ato Sotoku no kuten a satao' awaay ko sakakihar a sapinangen. Talacowa ira to nai Mancin ko nian, mipatireng ko sifo to "toniwku" sapitena' no payrang to yincumin a "micomod", nika so'elinay, o payrang ko 'ayaw to yincumin misanga'. O tadamaanay a payrang pasiyincumin mi'aca to sera, ano eca miki'ayaw micalap to sera a mimatang, roma padeteng o sapitena' to yincumin, micalap to sakacisera. Sadadahal sato ko picalap no payrang to nano pala no yincumin, sapi'adingaw to nimatangan a lotok, mitahidang to 'alomanay sapitena' aiyong, ma'awid to ko nano kasasidama, masanga' to kapolongan pimatangan a pala. Tangasa to pikowan no Dipong, midoedo ko Sotoku no kuten to nano Mancin to aiyong satena' a satao', o imeng to ko citodongay mikowan to aiyong satena', o sapipadoedo no payrang to aiyong a demak, wata ko pihakelong to sifo. Patilien to no Sotoku no kuten ko dingki a calay, samangahen ko yincumin malinah i laloma'ay no calay a makowan no imeng, samatiya sato i "mihaydaay ano eca caayay pihayda" a kalala'edan sakowan no Sotoku no kuten. Saki Sotoku no kuten i, o sapiparanikay to sakang'ay no kinaira, iraay to ko aiyong to sakilotokan sapicowat no Sotoku no kuten, haki Meici 42 miheca (1910) nai ci Sakuma Sayu Sotoku to pikeroh limaay miheca lifan a satao', mafalic o tata'akay a kalalood, o nano yincumin a niyaro' mala o Sotoku to a nikowanan. Pakayni to pakacimapatayay a demak, tatodong sa i nacilaay miheca (Meici 39 miheca (1906)) malaheci to kina tosaay aiyong satena', masiiked i 'ayaw no miheca ikoray miheca a Pipo sepa calay ko picikeroh. Itini toya fa'elohay nialaan, caay ka tanetek, saheto o kasasiwtoc no kasala'ed, maliyang ko yincumin, ano eca o sapicalapaw no payrang ko sakacifangafang, o sakacidemakaw. Caay ka dengan ko nian, i Meici 33 miheca (1900) ko Sotoku mipatireng to pipa'aca to rakes a kakawa, o Sotoku to ko tatapangan citodongay kaysya no misasimalay, oya malali'acaay ko malalifetay sakacitodong to kali'acaan, saka palecad han no Sotoku ko kali'aca to mi'acaay to 'aca, oya sato malali'acaay misatakaraw to 'aca patayra i roma kitakit pa'aca, itiya o Inkiris li'acaay a Samilo sanghuy pakaalaay to sakalatahic, tangasa i Meici 41 miheca (1908) itiya to maala no Sotoku ko salongoc pali'aca, patorod han to ko Mitsui pussan kapushi kikaisya ko pa'acaay. O kala'acaan no rakes itiya i, malitosaay ko kacitodong no payrang: o cecay o mikadomay, mikadom cangra to payso, saka kahien no Sotoku caira o misanga'ay to pisarakes, citodong to misarakesay no Taywan, tinako itiraay i Wufong lin a laloma'an ci Lin Lietang; oroma i o matayalay misang' to pisarakes a tamdaw, o "nawting" (rakes a koli), itiraay i no Taywan, Dipong a tawki milietanay tamdaw. nikawrira saan i Meici 36 (1903) miheca mapatireng to ko patodongan kali'acaan kakawa, oya oya 'alomanay mili'aacaay no Dipong ala taynini to patongal to rakes a simal patayni Taywan, nanoyaan o Dipong to ko mirepetay to kalali'acaan, oya payrang sato mala o matayalay no kaysya no Dipong. Meici 40 (1907) miheca 9 folad 5 romi'ad, pakayni i Sotoku a picikeroh to aiyong satena' i, macalap to ko adihayay pi'adopan no yincumin, adihay ko o nano karari'angan macalap, kalingsesan koya karari'angan, awaay to ko 'icel no yincumin a miliyang, hakelong sato to cering sakowan no Dipong. Oya katalawan kamirmiran a satena', cimalasawaday to tamdaw a mapatay, oya papotalay no satena' a yincumin marokrok ko faloco' maliyang, sapilesaotaw to finawlan to sapiliyang, milood to ka'acekan nengnengen mari'angay tamdaw. Icila, ala comocomod sa ko payrang ikaka to 'ayaway i Pilay ngasaw a pi'adopan, oya Pilay niyaro' o nano pikapotan no yincumin to payrang a malamisarakesay, ano eca ano malasawad ko pi'adopan nangra samaanen naira padafoh to laloma'an? Caay kahakowa ko kinaira naira caay ko kafokilan, o miesesay ikaka tono payrang a Dipong a tamdaw, cairaay ko sa'adihayay to cikinairaay, nika macangal ho caira o Dipong a tamdaw. Rakes, lalengawan no saka'ilo, pafelian no awaayay ma'araw ko tanektekay a rakes kilang, mala sapisanga' to kasasikelotan naira, masanga' aca ko sapikelot to simal. O polong no rakes, awaay to kalaloodan naira i matini. Anini 'ayaw no lahok, nai mimingay talo'an miteka, o lalaplapen naira ko payrang, nika malasawad ko nano niharatengan no Dipong a tamdaw, sapicefesaw to o nano naloma'an naira i 'ayaw. Oya maliyangay a yincumin miala to aolay kowang naira, milood to keter naira. Matalaw ko payrang tona malingad caira, o aira ko saka tosa a aol kowang, ma'oripto mapatayto o sapadang cairaan a milaliw, nika kafana'en maliyok to caira. Hadoc sato ko yincumin to po'ot micocok to faloco' no payrang tamdaw, ngayawen nangra ko tangal no payrang, saki malakoliay no Dipong tikokko, o todong pilokes to matalemay po'ot nangra. Tayra i tokos no lotok ko yincumin, mikecor to kinaira, miromrom to lamal todong o keter no faloco', o kasapinangan ko acefel, sapihinom to mapatayay a finawlan, pa'ayaw to i sekalay Dipong a tamdaw: o paloma'an niyam konini a sera, o pacarcaray a lafang ko katayni kamo. Mikawitay: Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay

¶i…ĺaaj mińß…ô ¶a (m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****)) ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u kina to~usaaj aijo~uŇč sat…ôna °, masiik…ô…¨~…ģ i °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶a iko~uraj mińß…ô ¶a a pipo~u s…ôpa ¶a…ĺaj ko~u pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß. tatapaŇčan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj kajsja no~u misasima…ĺaj, o~uja ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj ko~u ma…ĺa…ĺif…ôtaj saka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka…ĺi °a ¶aan, saka pa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ńßan no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ko~u ka…ĺi °a ¶a to~u mi °a ¶aaj to~u °a ¶a, o~uja sato~u ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj misatakaraw to~u °a ¶a patajra i ro~uma kitakit pa °a ¶a, itija o~u inkiris …ĺi °a ¶aaj a sami…ĺo~u saŇčńßo~u~uj pakaa…ĺaaj to~u saka…ĺatańßi ¶, taŇčasa i m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) itija to~u maa…ĺa no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ko~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ pa…ĺi °a ¶a, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģ ńßan to~u ko~u mitso~u~ui po~u~ussan kapo~u~usńßi kikaisja ko~u pa °a ¶aaj. o~u ka…ĺa °a ¶aan no~u rak…ôs itija i, ma…ĺito~usaaj ko~u ka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u pajraŇč: o~u ¶…ô ¶aj o~u mika…¨~…ģo~umaj, mika…¨~…ģo~um ¶aŇčra to~u pajso~u, saka kańßi…ôn no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ¶aira o~u misaŇča °aj to~u pisarak…ôs, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u misarak…ôsaj no~u tajwan, tinako~u itiraaj i wo~u~ufo~uŇč …ĺin a …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ¶i …ĺin …ĺi…ôtaŇč; o~uro~uma i o~u mataja…ĺaj misaŇč ° to~u pisarak…ôs a tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u "nawtiŇč" (rak…ôs a ko~u…ĺi), itiraaj i no~u tajwan, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tawki mi…ĺi…ôtanaj tam…¨~…ģaw. nikawrira saan i m…ôi ¶i ** (****) mińß…ô ¶a mapatir…ôŇč to~u ko~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčan ka…ĺi °a ¶aan kakawa, o~uja o~uja °a…ĺo~umanaj mi…ĺi °aa ¶aaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a…ĺa tajnini to~u pato~uŇča…ĺ to~u rak…ôs a sima…ĺ patajni tajwan, nano~ujaan o~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u ko~u mir…ôp…ôtaj to~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aan, o~uja pajraŇč sato~u ma…ĺa o~u mataja…ĺaj no~u kajsja no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. m…ôi ¶i ** (****) mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, pakajni i so~uto~uko~u~u a pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u aijo~uŇč sat…ôna ° i, ma ¶a…ĺap to~u ko~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u o~u nano~u karari °aŇčan ma ¶a…ĺap, ka…ĺiŇčs…ôsan ko~uja karari °aŇčan, awaaj to~u ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u jin ¶o~u~umin a mi…ĺijaŇč, ńßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč sato~u to~u ¶…ôriŇč sako~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. o~uja kata…ĺawan kamirmiran a sat…ôna °, ¶ima…ĺasawa…¨~…ģaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mapataj, o~uja papo~uta…ĺaj no~u sat…ôna ° a jin ¶o~u~umin maro~ukro~uk ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ma…ĺijaŇč, sapi…ĺ…ôsao~utaw to~u finaw…ĺan to~u sapi…ĺijaŇč, mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ka °a ¶…ôkan n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn mari °aŇčaj tam…¨~…ģaw. i ¶i…ĺa, a…ĺa ¶o~umo~u ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ sa ko~u pajraŇč ikaka to~u °ajawaj i pi…ĺaj Ňčasaw a pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan, o~uja pi…ĺaj nijaro~u ° o~u nano~u pikapo~utan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin to~u pajraŇč a ma…ĺamisarak…ôsaj, ano~u …ô ¶a ano~u ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan naŇčra samaan…ôn naira pa…¨~…ģafo~uńß to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an? ¶aaj kańßako~uwa ko~u kinaira naira ¶aaj ko~u kafo~uki…ĺan, o~u mi…ôs…ôsaj ikaka to~uno~u pajraŇč a …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶airaaj ko~u sa °a…¨~…ģińßajaj to~u ¶ikinairaaj, nika ma ¶aŇča…ĺ ńßo~u ¶aira o~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw. rak…ôs, …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan no~u saka °i…ĺo~u, paf…ô…ĺian no~u awaajaj ma °araw ko~u tan…ôkt…ôkaj a rak…ôs ki…ĺaŇč, ma…ĺa sapisaŇča ° to~u kasasik…ô…ĺo~utan naira, masaŇča ° a ¶a ko~u sapik…ô…ĺo~ut to~u sima…ĺ. o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u rak…ôs, awaaj to~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan naira i matini. anini °ajaw no~u …ĺańßo~uk, nai mimiŇčaj ta…ĺo~u °an mit…ôka, o~u …ĺa…ĺap…ĺap…ôn naira ko~u pajraŇč, nika ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u nano~u nińßarat…ôŇčan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, sapi ¶…ôf…ôsaw to~u o~u nano~u na…ĺo~uma °an naira i °ajaw. o~uja ma…ĺijaŇčaj a jin ¶o~u~umin mia…ĺa to~u ao~u…ĺaj ko~uwaŇč naira, mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u k…ôt…ôr naira. mata…ĺaw ko~u pajraŇč to~una ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ ¶aira, o~u aira ko~u saka to~usa a ao~u…ĺ ko~uwaŇč, ma °o~uripto~u mapatajto~u o~u sapa…¨~…ģaŇč ¶airaan a mi…ĺa…ĺiw, nika kafana °…ôn ma…ĺijo~uk to~u ¶aira. ńßa…¨~…ģo~u ¶ sato~u ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin to~u po~u °o~ut mi ¶o~u ¶o~uk to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u pajraŇč tam…¨~…ģaw, Ňčajaw…ôn naŇčra ko~u taŇča…ĺ no~u pajraŇč, saki ma…ĺako~u…ĺiaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč tiko~ukko~u, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pi…ĺo~uk…ôs to~u mata…ĺ…ômaj po~u °o~ut naŇčra. tajra i to~uko~us no~u …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin, mik…ô ¶o~ur to~u kinaira, miro~umro~um to~u …ĺama…ĺ to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u k…ôt…ôr no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u kasapinaŇčan ko~u a ¶…ôf…ô…ĺ, sapińßino~um to~u mapatajaj a finaw…ĺan, pa °ajaw to~u i s…ôka…ĺaj …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw: o~u pa…ĺo~uma °an nijam ko~unini a s…ôra, o~u pa ¶ar ¶araj a …ĺafaŇč ko~u katajni kamo~u. mikawitaj: sin tajwan ńß…ôpin kikiŇčkaj
S.FORM: == Aiyong a satena' no kaDipongan == Kasasicorah cimapatayay a Aiyong a satena' no kaDipongan, o maan ko mapainiay? Meici 40 miheca (1907) 4 folad 5 romi'ad, malengat ko kacarahan masapinang no paratohay (Taiwan nippo), i 9 romi'ad a sinpon Pilay calay a nipatadoan a cimapatayay maparatoh konini a lalengatan demak: "I 4 folad 5 romi'ad to 'ayaw no lahok, talifahal sa macorah koya nimatangan pala a talo'an no yincumin, makacimapatayay to tatolo a tamdaw. nawhani toya 'ayaw miheca (1906) 11 folad kaherekan a micikeroh to aiyong a satena' i Sincu sa'etal, o mamisadadahal to pala a mimatang, orasaka oya mitomadaway tamdaw pakayni to i lawacay a pinafalah a 'aolan kowang ato tolac, o nano kadademakan no yincumin a mingayaw sato. Nikawrira, nengnengen koya tangal caay ka keton, caay ko todong o nano yincumin a "ningayawan" saan ko patinako." Nengnengen ko piparatoh tonini a demak, midemakay tonini awaay ko todong to o nano nipidemak no tamdaw a yincumin, pakayni to nia demak i 1907 miheca ato itiraay i Sincu, caor sa ko harateng to i nacilaay miheca 39 miheca (1906) to itiraay i Sincu a aiyong ko pakapot. Nikawrira, onini a sakacimapatayay a lalengatan ato Sotoku no kuten a satao' awaay ko sakakihar a sapinangen. Talacowa ira to nai Mancin ko nian, mipatireng ko sifo to "toniwku" sapitena' no payrang to yincumin a "micomod", nika so'elinay, o payrang ko 'ayaw to yincumin misanga'. O tadamaanay a payrang pasiyincumin mi'aca to sera, ano eca miki'ayaw micalap to sera a mimatang, roma padeteng o sapitena' to yincumin, micalap to sakacisera. Sadadahal sato ko picalap no payrang to nano pala no yincumin, sapi'adingaw to nimatangan a lotok, mitahidang to 'alomanay sapitena' aiyong, ma'awid to ko nano kasasidama, masanga' to kapolongan pimatangan a pala. Tangasa to pikowan no Dipong, midoedo ko Sotoku no kuten to nano Mancin to aiyong satena' a satao', o imeng to ko citodongay mikowan to aiyong satena', o sapipadoedo no payrang to aiyong a demak, wata ko pihakelong to sifo. Patilien to no Sotoku no kuten ko dingki a calay, samangahen ko yincumin malinah i laloma'ay no calay a makowan no imeng, samatiya sato i "mihaydaay ano eca caayay pihayda" a kalala'edan sakowan no Sotoku no kuten. Saki Sotoku no kuten i, o sapiparanikay to sakang'ay no kinaira, iraay to ko aiyong to sakilotokan sapicowat no Sotoku no kuten, haki Meici 42 miheca (1910) nai ci Sakuma Sayu Sotoku to pikeroh limaay miheca lifan a satao', mafalic o tata'akay a kalalood, o nano yincumin a niyaro' mala o Sotoku to a nikowanan. Pakayni to pakacimapatayay a demak, tatodong sa i nacilaay miheca (Meici 39 miheca (1906)) malaheci to kina tosaay aiyong satena', masiiked i 'ayaw no miheca ikoray miheca a Pipo sepa calay ko picikeroh. Itini toya fa'elohay nialaan, caay ka tanetek, saheto o kasasiwtoc no kasala'ed, maliyang ko yincumin, ano eca o sapicalapaw no payrang ko sakacifangafang, o sakacidemakaw. Caay ka dengan ko nian, i Meici 33 miheca (1900) ko Sotoku mipatireng to pipa'aca to rakes a kakawa, o Sotoku to ko tatapangan citodongay kaysya no misasimalay, oya malali'acaay ko malalifetay sakacitodong to kali'acaan, saka palecad han no Sotoku ko kali'aca to mi'acaay to 'aca, oya sato malali'acaay misatakaraw to 'aca patayra i roma kitakit pa'aca, itiya o Inkiris li'acaay a Samilo sanghuy pakaalaay to sakalatahic, tangasa i Meici 41 miheca (1908) itiya to maala no Sotoku ko salongoc pali'aca, patorod han to ko Mitsui pussan kapushi kikaisya ko pa'acaay. O kala'acaan no rakes itiya i, malitosaay ko kacitodong no payrang: o cecay o mikadomay, mikadom cangra to payso, saka kahien no Sotoku caira o misanga'ay to pisarakes, citodong to misarakesay no Taywan, tinako itiraay i Wufong lin a laloma'an ci Lin Lietang; oroma i o matayalay misang' to pisarakes a tamdaw, o "nawting" (rakes a koli), itiraay i no Taywan, Dipong a tawki milietanay tamdaw. nikawrira saan i Meici 36 (1903) miheca mapatireng to ko patodongan kali'acaan kakawa, oya oya 'alomanay mili'aacaay no Dipong ala taynini to patongal to rakes a simal patayni Taywan, nanoyaan o Dipong to ko mirepetay to kalali'acaan, oya payrang sato mala o matayalay no kaysya no Dipong. Meici 40 (1907) miheca 9 folad 5 romi'ad, pakayni i Sotoku a picikeroh to aiyong satena' i, macalap to ko adihayay pi'adopan no yincumin, adihay ko o nano karari'angan macalap, kalingsesan koya karari'angan, awaay to ko 'icel no yincumin a miliyang, hakelong sato to cering sakowan no Dipong. Oya katalawan kamirmiran a satena', cimalasawaday to tamdaw a mapatay, oya papotalay no satena' a yincumin marokrok ko faloco' maliyang, sapilesaotaw to finawlan to sapiliyang, milood to ka'acekan nengnengen mari'angay tamdaw. Icila, ala comocomod sa ko payrang ikaka to 'ayaway i Pilay ngasaw a pi'adopan, oya Pilay niyaro' o nano pikapotan no yincumin to payrang a malamisarakesay, ano eca ano malasawad ko pi'adopan nangra samaanen naira padafoh to laloma'an? Caay kahakowa ko kinaira naira caay ko kafokilan, o miesesay ikaka tono payrang a Dipong a tamdaw, cairaay ko sa'adihayay to cikinairaay, nika macangal ho caira o Dipong a tamdaw. Rakes, lalengawan no saka'ilo, pafelian no awaayay ma'araw ko tanektekay a rakes kilang, mala sapisanga' to kasasikelotan naira, masanga' aca ko sapikelot to simal. O polong no rakes, awaay to kalaloodan naira i matini. Anini 'ayaw no lahok, nai mimingay talo'an miteka, o lalaplapen naira ko payrang, nika malasawad ko nano niharatengan no Dipong a tamdaw, sapicefesaw to o nano naloma'an naira i 'ayaw. Oya maliyangay a yincumin miala to aolay kowang naira, milood to keter naira. Matalaw ko payrang tona malingad caira, o aira ko saka tosa a aol kowang, ma'oripto mapatayto o sapadang cairaan a milaliw, nika kafana'en maliyok to caira. Hadoc sato ko yincumin to po'ot micocok to faloco' no payrang tamdaw, ngayawen nangra ko tangal no payrang, saki malakoliay no Dipong tikokko, o todong pilokes to matalemay po'ot nangra. Tayra i tokos no lotok ko yincumin, mikecor to kinaira, miromrom to lamal todong o keter no faloco', o kasapinangan ko acefel, sapihinom to mapatayay a finawlan, pa'ayaw to i sekalay Dipong a tamdaw: o paloma'an niyam konini a sera, o pacarcaray a lafang ko katayni kamo. Mikawitay: Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay
S.PHON: == aijo~uŇč a sat…ôna ° no~u ka…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan == kasasi ¶o~urańß ¶imapatajaj a aijo~uŇč a sat…ôna ° no~u ka…¨~…ģipo~uŇčan, o~u maan ko~u mapainiaj? m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺ…ôŇčat ko~u ka ¶arańßan masapinaŇč no~u parato~uńßaj (taiwan nippo~u), i * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ a sinpo~un pi…ĺaj ¶a…ĺaj a nipata…¨~…ģo~uan a ¶imapatajaj maparato~uńß ko~unini a …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčatan …¨~…ģ…ômak: "i * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ to~u °ajaw no~u …ĺańßo~uk, ta…ĺifańßa…ĺ sa ma ¶o~urańß ko~uja nimataŇčan pa…ĺa a ta…ĺo~u °an no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, maka ¶imapatajaj to~u tato~u…ĺo~u a tam…¨~…ģaw. nawńßani to~uja °ajaw mińß…ô ¶a (****) ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ kańß…ôr…ôkan a mi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u aijo~uŇč a sat…ôna ° i sin ¶o~u~u sa °…ôta…ĺ, o~u mamisa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ to~u pa…ĺa a mimataŇč, o~urasaka o~uja mito~uma…¨~…ģawaj tam…¨~…ģaw pakajni to~u i …ĺawa ¶aj a pinafa…ĺańß a °ao~u…ĺan ko~uwaŇč ato~u to~u…ĺa ¶, o~u nano~u ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ômakan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin a miŇčajaw sato~u. nikawrira, n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ko~uja taŇča…ĺ ¶aaj ka k…ôto~un, ¶aaj ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u nano~u jin ¶o~u~umin a "niŇčajawan" saan ko~u patinako~u." n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn ko~u piparato~uńß to~unini a …¨~…ģ…ômak, mi…¨~…ģ…ômakaj to~unini awaaj ko~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u o~u nano~u nipi…¨~…ģ…ômak no~u tam…¨~…ģaw a jin ¶o~u~umin, pakajni to~u nia …¨~…ģ…ômak i **** mińß…ô ¶a ato~u itiraaj i sin ¶o~u~u, ¶ao~ur sa ko~u ńßarat…ôŇč to~u i na ¶i…ĺaaj mińß…ô ¶a ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) to~u itiraaj i sin ¶o~u~u a aijo~uŇč ko~u pakapo~ut. nikawrira, o~unini a saka ¶imapatajaj a …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčatan ato~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn a satao~u ° awaaj ko~u sakakińßar a sapinaŇč…ôn. ta…ĺa ¶o~uwa ira to~u nai man ¶in ko~u nian, mipatir…ôŇč ko~u sifo~u to~u "to~uniwko~u~u" sapit…ôna ° no~u pajraŇč to~u jin ¶o~u~umin a "mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ", nika so~u °…ô…ĺinaj, o~u pajraŇč ko~u °ajaw to~u jin ¶o~u~umin misaŇča °. o~u ta…¨~…ģamaanaj a pajraŇč pasijin ¶o~u~umin mi °a ¶a to~u s…ôra, ano~u …ô ¶a miki °ajaw mi ¶a…ĺap to~u s…ôra a mimataŇč, ro~uma pa…¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč o~u sapit…ôna ° to~u jin ¶o~u~umin, mi ¶a…ĺap to~u saka ¶is…ôra. sa…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ sato~u ko~u pi ¶a…ĺap no~u pajraŇč to~u nano~u pa…ĺa no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, sapi °a…¨~…ģiŇčaw to~u nimataŇčan a …ĺo~uto~uk, mitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč to~u °a…ĺo~umanaj sapit…ôna ° aijo~uŇč, ma °awi…¨~…ģ to~u ko~u nano~u kasasi…¨~…ģama, masaŇča ° to~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan pimataŇčan a pa…ĺa. taŇčasa to~u piko~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč, mi…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u ko~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn to~u nano~u man ¶in to~u aijo~uŇč sat…ôna ° a satao~u °, o~u im…ôŇč to~u ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj miko~uwan to~u aijo~uŇč sat…ôna °, o~u sapipa…¨~…ģo~u…ô…¨~…ģo~u no~u pajraŇč to~u aijo~uŇč a …¨~…ģ…ômak, wata ko~u pińßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč to~u sifo~u. pati…ĺi…ôn to~u no~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn ko~u …¨~…ģiŇčki a ¶a…ĺaj, samaŇčańß…ôn ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin ma…ĺinańß i …ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u ¶a…ĺaj a mako~uwan no~u im…ôŇč, samatija sato~u i "mińßaj…¨~…ģaaj ano~u …ô ¶a ¶aajaj pińßaj…¨~…ģa" a ka…ĺa…ĺa °…ô…¨~…ģan sako~uwan no~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn. saki so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn i, o~u sapiparanikaj to~u sakaŇč °aj no~u kinaira, iraaj to~u ko~u aijo~uŇč to~u saki…ĺo~uto~ukan sapi ¶o~uwat no~u so~uto~uko~u~u no~u ko~u~ut…ôn, ńßaki m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) nai ¶i sako~u~uma sajo~u~u so~uto~uko~u~u to~u pik…ôro~uńß …ĺimaaj mińß…ô ¶a …ĺifan a satao~u °, mafa…ĺi ¶ o~u tata °akaj a ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ, o~u nano~u jin ¶o~u~umin a nijaro~u ° ma…ĺa o~u so~uto~uko~u~u to~u a niko~uwanan. pakajni to~u paka ¶imapatajaj a …¨~…ģ…ômak, tato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč sa i na ¶i…ĺaaj mińß…ô ¶a (m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****)) ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i to~u kina to~usaaj aijo~uŇč sat…ôna °, masiik…ô…¨~…ģ i °ajaw no~u mińß…ô ¶a iko~uraj mińß…ô ¶a a pipo~u s…ôpa ¶a…ĺaj ko~u pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß. itini to~uja fa °…ô…ĺo~uńßaj nia…ĺaan, ¶aaj ka tan…ôt…ôk, sańß…ôto~u o~u kasasiwto~u ¶ no~u kasa…ĺa °…ô…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺijaŇč ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin, ano~u …ô ¶a o~u sapi ¶a…ĺapaw no~u pajraŇč ko~u saka ¶ifaŇčafaŇč, o~u saka ¶i…¨~…ģ…ômakaw. ¶aaj ka …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ko~u nian, i m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) ko~u so~uto~uko~u~u mipatir…ôŇč to~u pipa °a ¶a to~u rak…ôs a kakawa, o~u so~uto~uko~u~u to~u ko~u tatapaŇčan ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj kajsja no~u misasima…ĺaj, o~uja ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj ko~u ma…ĺa…ĺif…ôtaj saka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u ka…ĺi °a ¶aan, saka pa…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ńßan no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ko~u ka…ĺi °a ¶a to~u mi °a ¶aaj to~u °a ¶a, o~uja sato~u ma…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aaj misatakaraw to~u °a ¶a patajra i ro~uma kitakit pa °a ¶a, itija o~u inkiris …ĺi °a ¶aaj a sami…ĺo~u saŇčńßo~u~uj pakaa…ĺaaj to~u saka…ĺatańßi ¶, taŇčasa i m…ôi ¶i ** mińß…ô ¶a (****) itija to~u maa…ĺa no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ko~u sa…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ pa…ĺi °a ¶a, pato~uro~u…¨~…ģ ńßan to~u ko~u mitso~u~ui po~u~ussan kapo~u~usńßi kikaisja ko~u pa °a ¶aaj. o~u ka…ĺa °a ¶aan no~u rak…ôs itija i, ma…ĺito~usaaj ko~u ka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč no~u pajraŇč: o~u ¶…ô ¶aj o~u mika…¨~…ģo~umaj, mika…¨~…ģo~um ¶aŇčra to~u pajso~u, saka kańßi…ôn no~u so~uto~uko~u~u ¶aira o~u misaŇča °aj to~u pisarak…ôs, ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u misarak…ôsaj no~u tajwan, tinako~u itiraaj i wo~u~ufo~uŇč …ĺin a …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an ¶i …ĺin …ĺi…ôtaŇč; o~uro~uma i o~u mataja…ĺaj misaŇč ° to~u pisarak…ôs a tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u "nawtiŇč" (rak…ôs a ko~u…ĺi), itiraaj i no~u tajwan, …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tawki mi…ĺi…ôtanaj tam…¨~…ģaw. nikawrira saan i m…ôi ¶i ** (****) mińß…ô ¶a mapatir…ôŇč to~u ko~u pato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčan ka…ĺi °a ¶aan kakawa, o~uja o~uja °a…ĺo~umanaj mi…ĺi °aa ¶aaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a…ĺa tajnini to~u pato~uŇča…ĺ to~u rak…ôs a sima…ĺ patajni tajwan, nano~ujaan o~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč to~u ko~u mir…ôp…ôtaj to~u ka…ĺa…ĺi °a ¶aan, o~uja pajraŇč sato~u ma…ĺa o~u mataja…ĺaj no~u kajsja no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. m…ôi ¶i ** (****) mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, pakajni i so~uto~uko~u~u a pi ¶ik…ôro~uńß to~u aijo~uŇč sat…ôna ° i, ma ¶a…ĺap to~u ko~u a…¨~…ģińßajaj pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin, a…¨~…ģińßaj ko~u o~u nano~u karari °aŇčan ma ¶a…ĺap, ka…ĺiŇčs…ôsan ko~uja karari °aŇčan, awaaj to~u ko~u °i ¶…ô…ĺ no~u jin ¶o~u~umin a mi…ĺijaŇč, ńßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč sato~u to~u ¶…ôriŇč sako~uwan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč. o~uja kata…ĺawan kamirmiran a sat…ôna °, ¶ima…ĺasawa…¨~…ģaj to~u tam…¨~…ģaw a mapataj, o~uja papo~uta…ĺaj no~u sat…ôna ° a jin ¶o~u~umin maro~ukro~uk ko~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ma…ĺijaŇč, sapi…ĺ…ôsao~utaw to~u finaw…ĺan to~u sapi…ĺijaŇč, mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ka °a ¶…ôkan n…ôŇčn…ôŇč…ôn mari °aŇčaj tam…¨~…ģaw. i ¶i…ĺa, a…ĺa ¶o~umo~u ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ sa ko~u pajraŇč ikaka to~u °ajawaj i pi…ĺaj Ňčasaw a pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan, o~uja pi…ĺaj nijaro~u ° o~u nano~u pikapo~utan no~u jin ¶o~u~umin to~u pajraŇč a ma…ĺamisarak…ôsaj, ano~u …ô ¶a ano~u ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u pi °a…¨~…ģo~upan naŇčra samaan…ôn naira pa…¨~…ģafo~uńß to~u …ĺa…ĺo~uma °an? ¶aaj kańßako~uwa ko~u kinaira naira ¶aaj ko~u kafo~uki…ĺan, o~u mi…ôs…ôsaj ikaka to~uno~u pajraŇč a …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, ¶airaaj ko~u sa °a…¨~…ģińßajaj to~u ¶ikinairaaj, nika ma ¶aŇča…ĺ ńßo~u ¶aira o~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw. rak…ôs, …ĺa…ĺ…ôŇčawan no~u saka °i…ĺo~u, paf…ô…ĺian no~u awaajaj ma °araw ko~u tan…ôkt…ôkaj a rak…ôs ki…ĺaŇč, ma…ĺa sapisaŇča ° to~u kasasik…ô…ĺo~utan naira, masaŇča ° a ¶a ko~u sapik…ô…ĺo~ut to~u sima…ĺ. o~u po~u…ĺo~uŇč no~u rak…ôs, awaaj to~u ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan naira i matini. anini °ajaw no~u …ĺańßo~uk, nai mimiŇčaj ta…ĺo~u °an mit…ôka, o~u …ĺa…ĺap…ĺap…ôn naira ko~u pajraŇč, nika ma…ĺasawa…¨~…ģ ko~u nano~u nińßarat…ôŇčan no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw, sapi ¶…ôf…ôsaw to~u o~u nano~u na…ĺo~uma °an naira i °ajaw. o~uja ma…ĺijaŇčaj a jin ¶o~u~umin mia…ĺa to~u ao~u…ĺaj ko~uwaŇč naira, mi…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ to~u k…ôt…ôr naira. mata…ĺaw ko~u pajraŇč to~una ma…ĺiŇča…¨~…ģ ¶aira, o~u aira ko~u saka to~usa a ao~u…ĺ ko~uwaŇč, ma °o~uripto~u mapatajto~u o~u sapa…¨~…ģaŇč ¶airaan a mi…ĺa…ĺiw, nika kafana °…ôn ma…ĺijo~uk to~u ¶aira. ńßa…¨~…ģo~u ¶ sato~u ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin to~u po~u °o~ut mi ¶o~u ¶o~uk to~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° no~u pajraŇč tam…¨~…ģaw, Ňčajaw…ôn naŇčra ko~u taŇča…ĺ no~u pajraŇč, saki ma…ĺako~u…ĺiaj no~u …¨~…ģipo~uŇč tiko~ukko~u, o~u to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč pi…ĺo~uk…ôs to~u mata…ĺ…ômaj po~u °o~ut naŇčra. tajra i to~uko~us no~u …ĺo~uto~uk ko~u jin ¶o~u~umin, mik…ô ¶o~ur to~u kinaira, miro~umro~um to~u …ĺama…ĺ to~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč o~u k…ôt…ôr no~u fa…ĺo~u ¶o~u °, o~u kasapinaŇčan ko~u a ¶…ôf…ô…ĺ, sapińßino~um to~u mapatajaj a finaw…ĺan, pa °ajaw to~u i s…ôka…ĺaj …¨~…ģipo~uŇč a tam…¨~…ģaw: o~u pa…ĺo~uma °an nijam ko~unini a s…ôra, o~u pa ¶ar ¶araj a …ĺafaŇč ko~u katajni kamo~u. mikawitaj: sin tajwan ńß…ôpin kikiŇčkaj
